あっ……司令官様！<br>実は教会から依頼された新しい魔法石細工のデザインに迷っ:
Ah... L-Lord Commander! Actually, I've been struggling with the
design for a new magic stone craft piece commissioned by the church...
ここの噴水、綺麗ですよね……。<br>こんな水の流れを魔法石細工で表現できたら素:
Th-the fountain here is beautiful, isn't it? If I could express this
water flow in magic stone craft, that might be wonderful...
へぇ～、『みんなの力を1つの流れにする』、<br>……そんな意味を込めてこの噴水:
I see... 'Unifying everyone's power into one flow'... So that's the
meaning behind this fountain?
ふふっ、司令官様と話してたら、いいインスピレーションが浮かんできました。<br>:
Fufu, talking with you, Lord Commander, gave me some great
inspiration. Um... my sketchbook... where did I put it...?
新作の魔法石細工、完成したら司令官様にも連絡しますね？<br>みんな、喜んでくれ:
Once I finish the new magic stone craft piece, I'll let you know,
L-Lord Commander. I hope everyone will like it...
